items.title: From PMF to average surprise
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  pmf["PMF p(x) over outcomes"]
  surprise["Self-info: -log p(x)"]
  avg["H(X) = weighted average"]
  pmf --> surprise
  surprise --> avg
items.caption: Each outcome contributes −log p(x) surprise; entropy averages those contributions with weights p(x).

items.title: Entropy bounds for n outcomes
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  det["Deterministic: one p=1"]
  mid["Skewed distribution"]
  uni["Uniform over n values"]
  det --> h0["H(X) = 0"]
  mid --> hmid["0 less than H less than log n"]
  uni --> hmax["H(X) = log n bits"]
items.caption: Entropy ranges from 0 (no uncertainty) to log n bits when all n outcomes are equally likely.

items.title: Information gain in a decision tree split
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  parent["Parent node H = 1 bit"]
  split["Feature split"]
  left["Left child H = 0"]
  right["Right child H = 0"]
  gain["Info gain = 1 bit"]
  parent --> split
  split --> left
  split --> right
  left --> gain
  right --> gain
items.caption: A good split reduces weighted child entropy; information gain is parent H(X) minus the weighted sum of child entropies.
